hero.subtitle: LUXURY SPA & MASSAGE
hero.title: Royal Wellness Spa
hero.description: Indulge in a tranquil spa experience designed to restore balance to both body and mind

welcome.subtitle: WELCOME TO ROYAL WELLNESS SPA
welcome.title: A Sanctuary of
welcome.description: Nestled on the 3rd floor with panoramic views, Royal Wellness Spa offers an escape from the ordinary. With expert massage techniques passed down through generations and premium aromatic oils sourced from Thailand's finest botanical gardens, every treatment is a journey to complete renewal.

travelRecovery.subtitle: PERFECT FOR TRAVELERS
travelRecovery.title: Travel Recovery
travelRecovery.description: Designed specifically for weary travelers, our recovery treatments restore your body and mind after long journeys. From jet lag to digital fatigue, we have the perfect remedy for modern travel stress.

usp.subtitle: WHY CHOOSE US
usp.title: What Makes Us
usp.description: At Royal Wellness Spa, we don't just offer massages – we craft transformative experiences that address the unique challenges of modern travelers and city dwellers.
usp.premiumProductsDesc: We exclusively use certified organic oils and botanical ingredients sourced from Thailand's finest suppliers.
usp.masterTherapistsDesc: Our therapists undergo 500+ hours of specialized training, combining ancient Thai techniques with modern wellness science.
usp.personalizedTreatmentsDesc: Every session begins with a consultation to customize pressure, focus areas, and aromatherapy to your specific needs.
usp.travelerFocusedDesc: Unique treatments designed specifically for jet lag, screen fatigue, and the physical demands of travel.

hotelDiscount.title: Royal Phuket City Hotel Guests Get
hotelDiscount.description: Staying at Royal Phuket City Hotel? Enjoy an exclusive 10% discount on all spa treatments. Simply present your room key or booking confirmation at reception.

categoryDescriptions.travelRecovery: Restore your body after long journeys

cta.subtitle: BEGIN YOUR JOURNEY
cta.title: Ready to Experience True Relaxation?
cta.description: Book your appointment today and discover the art of wellness at Royal Wellness Spa. Your sanctuary of serenity awaits.

footer.description: A sanctuary of serenity in the heart of Phuket. Experience the art of traditional Thai wellness.

treatmentsPage.subtitle: OUR TREATMENTS
treatmentsPage.title: Our
treatmentsPage.description: Discover our curated collection of treatments, each designed to restore balance and bring harmony to your body and mind.

booking.title: Book Your Treatment
booking.hotelGuest: I am a Royal Phuket City Hotel guest (10% discount)

contact.name: Your Name
contact.subject: Subject

about.subtitle: OUR STORY
about.title: About Royal Wellness Spa
about.description: Discover the journey of Royal Wellness Spa and our commitment to exceptional wellness experiences.

treatmentDescriptions.1: Deep release of neck, shoulder and back muscles, combined with scalp massage and warm eye compress to relieve work fatigue and restore lightness to body and mind.
treatmentDescriptions.2: Full-body posture revival treatment designed for modern workers. Deep release of back and shoulder muscles, hip and lower back rebalancing, and stretching techniques to restore elegant posture.
treatmentDescriptions.3: Restores the body after long travel using lymphatic drainage to reduce swelling and fatigue, combined with warm eye compress to reset freshness and energy.
treatmentDescriptions.4: Intensive foot and leg therapy for tired travelers after sightseeing. Includes herbal foot soak, foot and calf massage, and gentle stretching to restore mobility.
treatmentDescriptions.5: Intensive muscle repair for athletes and fitness enthusiasts. Includes deep tissue massage targeting trigger points, combined with stretching and hot herbal compress to accelerate recovery.
treatmentDescriptions.6: Full-body treatment to restore skin after sun exposure. Cool aloe vera gel and nourishing oils reduce redness and moisturize sun-kissed skin with gentle massage to promote skin healing.
treatmentDescriptions.7: Signature full-body and facial ritual — body scrub, aroma massage, and a complete Sculpting Lift Facial in one session. Luxury experience for truly glowing skin.
treatmentDescriptions.8: Luxurious skin journey including body scrub, nourishing massage, and a special wrap. Reveals silky smooth, radiant skin.
treatmentDescriptions.9: Romantic couple spa experience including flower bath, aroma massage for two, and light facial treatments. Creates precious moments of connection and relaxation together.
treatmentDescriptions.10: Luxury bridal spa package including body scrub, full-body massage, and glowing facial treatment. Prepares skin perfectly for the special day.
treatmentDescriptions.11: Gentle facial treatment for sun-exposed skin with cooling and nourishing ingredients. Reduces redness, restores hydration, and calms the skin. Perfect after outdoor activities.
treatmentDescriptions.12: Our signature facial treatment including deep cleansing, lifting massage, and special mask. Reveals youthful, radiant, and firmer skin.
treatmentDescriptions.13: Authentic Thai massage experience including pressure point techniques and stretching. Balances body energy and promotes overall wellness.
treatmentDescriptions.14: Relaxing essential oil massage combining gentle rhythms with calming aromatherapy. Reduces stress, promotes better sleep, and restores calm.
treatmentDescriptions.15: Traditional Thai herbal therapy using hot herbal compress balls to relax muscles, reduce pain, and promote circulation. Combined with Thai massage for maximum benefit.
treatmentDescriptions.16: Intensive foot treatment to energize tired legs. Includes herbal foot soak, pressure point massage, and moisturizing. Perfect as an add-on to any treatment.
treatmentDescriptions.17: Intensive head, neck and shoulder massage combining pressure points and scalp massage. Relieves tension, headaches, and mental fatigue.
treatmentDescriptions.18: Add-on herbal compress treatment using hot Thai herbal balls to relax muscles and promote relaxation. Pairs well with any massage treatment.
treatmentDescriptions.19: Specialized treatment for screen fatigue relief focusing on eyes, neck and shoulders. Includes warm eye compress, head massage, and neck relaxation techniques.
